mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_notification(id, user_id, type, title, body, link_url, ref_id) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{body}, #{linkUrl}, #{refId})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1)::int FROM user_notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND read_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE user_notification SET read_at = now() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND read_at IS NULL
